hero.name: Ekaterina
hero.title: Full-Stack / Front-End Developer
hero.bio:
Building scalable web apps and AI-powered platforms.
Passionate about clean architecture and great UX.

about.title: About Me
about.bio:
I'm a Full-Stack / Front-End Developer with 6+ years of experience building scalable web applications and AI-powered platforms.

My journey started with vanilla JavaScript and evolved through React ecosystems, Node.js backends, and modern AI integrations. I've worked across startups and enterprise environments, from founding teams to established B2B SaaS companies.

I specialize in turning complex requirements into clean, performant code — whether it's a real-time dashboard, an OCR pipeline, or a design system of 50+ components.
approach: Clean architecture first — scalable, maintainable code that grows with the product
User-centric design — every feature starts with the experience, not the tech
Full ownership — from architecture decisions to deployment and monitoring
Continuous learning — staying current with AI tools and modern frameworks
Collaboration — mentoring, code reviews, and clear documentation

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Open to new opportunities and interesting projects

geo-intelligence.subtitle: Geological AI Platform
description: Vertical AI platform for hydrogeologists covering the full cycle of geological documentation.
OCR pipeline: automated parsing of hundreds of PDF reports and borehole passports including scans — structured data extraction to DB.
RAG chat with hybrid search (vector + keyword), cross-encoder reranking, inline citations with source page links.
Interactive Mapbox borehole map with filtering. Passport builder with geological cross-section visualization.
AI compliance checker — validates reports against configurable regulatory checklists.
Monorepo: 3 services (web, api, ml), provider abstractions for LLM/embedding/storage, SSE streaming. Replaced hours of manual PDF lookup with minutes.

evm-hr-platform.subtitle: AI HR Platform
description: AI-powered B2B platform for team assessment built from zero to 12 paying clients (3 enterprise, 9 SMB). Full frontend ownership — architecture, development, deployment.
Monorepo of 8 Next.js apps, each with a dedicated NestJS BFF. Design system of 57 components with Figma sync — cut page dev time from 6–7 to 2–3 hours.
Survey constructor with 18 scale types, 360° assessment module with auto-save and timers, multi-step forms (React Hook Form + Zod).
Real-time dashboards: D3.js + Highcharts, WebSocket updates, PDF export.
Initiated RAG integration: digitized proprietary talent methodology as LLM knowledge base — report prep from 3–4h to minutes.
Testing from scratch: Jest + Playwright, 30% → 80% coverage in 2 months. Scrum Master (ICP), mentored a fullstack developer.

onetwtrip-whitelabel.subtitle: White-Label Travel Engine
description: B2B white-label engine for one of Russia's leading travel platforms.
Shipped 11 white-label solutions, maintained 20+ active integrations for major banks and airlines — Raiffeisen, Tinkoff, VTB, Sber, Aeroflot, S7, and others.
Embedded search, booking, and payment flows into client domains with full brand customization.
UI kit of 11 reusable components: Storybook docs, versioning, cross-browser and cross-brand consistency.
6 loyalty program integrations with real-time sync via Socket.io. Led JS → TypeScript migration with full test coverage. Tens of thousands of monthly users.

bitkov-exchange.subtitle: Cryptocurrency Exchange
description: Cryptocurrency exchange platform — full-stack: React + TypeScript frontend, Node.js / Express / PostgreSQL backend.
User dashboard: order booking, deal and rate tracking, referral program.
Integrated Garantex API for real-time rates. Telegram bot (Telegraf) for order management.
90–95% test coverage on critical user flows with Jest.
